title: lotus angustissimus subsp. hispidus
intro: Lotus angustissimus subsp. hispidus, a subspecies of the narrow-leaved lotus plant, is a type of aquatic plant that grows in shallow water and is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and promoting wound healing. Lotus angustissimus subsp. hispidus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, and is also used in some traditional Asian remedies.
